exports.content: The bandgap of (FAPbI3)1-x(MAPbBr3)x is tunable by adjusting the molar ratio x, with absorption edge shifting from 840 nm (x=0) to shorter wavelengths as x increases
exports.label: bandgap_tunable

exports.content: Bilayer solar-cell architecture with perovskite-infiltrated mesoporous TiO2 electrodes and upper perovskite layer obtained by solvent engineering techniques
exports.label: bilayer_architecture

exports.content: Mixing FAPbI3 with MAPbBr3 improves the balance between electron and hole transport, which is critical for high-efficiency perovskite solar cells
exports.label: carrier_balance_improved

exports.content: FAPbI3 has a bandgap of 1.48 eV with absorption edge of 840 nm, narrower than MAPbI3 (1.5-1.6 eV, edge ~800 nm), enabling broader solar spectrum absorption
exports.label: fa_narrower_bandgap

exports.content: Pure FAPbI3 black perovskite phase (alpha-phase) is thermally unstable, converting to yellow delta-phase at room temperature in humid atmosphere
exports.label: fa_phase_unstable

exports.content: FAPbI3 has a hole-diffusion length (~813 nm) 4.6 times longer than its electron-diffusion length (~177 nm), contrasting with MAPbI3 where electron diffusion length exceeds hole diffusion length
exports.label: hole_diffusion_superior

exports.content: Incorporation of MAPbBr3 into FAPbI3 stabilizes the perovskite phase of FAPbI3 and prevents conversion to the non-perovskite delta-phase
exports.label: mapbbr3_stabilizes_fapbi3

exports.content: FAPbI3/MAPbBr3 mixed perovskite solar cells show negligible hysteresis in J-V curves compared to MAPbI3-based cells, due to better balance of electron and hole transport
exports.label: negligible_hysteresis

exports.content: Optimal composition (FAPbI3)0.85(MAPbBr3)0.15 achieves maximum Jsc of 22 mA/cm2, Voc of 1.08 V, fill factor 73%, and PCE >18% under standard AM1.5G illumination
exports.label: optimal_composition_x15

exports.content: The (FAPbI3)0.85(MAPbBr3)0.15 composition achieves stabilized power conversion efficiency exceeding 18% under standard illumination of 100 mW/cm2
exports.label: pce_over_18_pct

exports.content: The mixed FAPbI3/MAPbBr3 composition shows improved thermal stability compared to pure FAPbI3, with the perovskite phase remaining stable at 100C annealing temperature
exports.label: thermal_stability_improved
